tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend SQL queries + sqlc regeneration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add three new queries to `db/queries/overview.sql` and regenerate `pkg/db/`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `db/queries/overview.sql`
- Regenerate: `pkg/db/overview.sql.go`, `pkg/db/querier.go`, `pkg/db/models.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- sqlc generate runs cleanly
- new queriers exposed
- go build ./... succeeds

**Verify:** `sqlc generate && go build ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files":["db/queries/overview.sql","pkg/db/overview.sql.go","pkg/db/querier.go","pkg/db/models.go"],"verifyCommand":"sqlc generate && go build ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["sqlc generate clean","new queriers exposed","go build succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Contract types + handler + helper tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `OverviewTokenBreakdownView`/`OverviewBreakdownRowView` to contract, write `mergeBreakdown` helper with tests, wire summary handler.

**Files:**
- Modify: `pkg/contract/overview.go`
- Create: `pkg/server/overview_breakdown.go`
- Modify: `pkg/server/handle_overview.go`
- Modify: `pkg/server/handle_overview_test.go`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Contract has new types with spec JSON tags
- mergeBreakdown joins without double-count
- Four merge tests pass
- Handler wires new queries

**Verify:** `go test ./... && go vet ./...`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/contract/overview.go","pkg/server/overview_breakdown.go","pkg/server/handle_overview.go","pkg/server/handle_overview_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./... && go vet ./...","acceptanceCriteria":["TokenBreakdown+Breakdown on contract","mergeBreakdown joins without double-count","handler wires new queries","four merge tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Regenerate OpenAPI + dashboard TS types
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sync the dashboard's typed client with new contract.

**Files:**
- Modify: `openapi.yaml`
- Modify: `dashboard/src/openapi-types.d.ts`

**Verify:** `mise run openapi && pnpm --dir dashboard generate-openapi && pnpm --dir dashboard type-check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["openapi.yaml","dashboard/src/openapi-types.d.ts"],"verifyCommand":"mise run openapi && pnpm --dir dashboard generate-openapi && pnpm --dir dashboard type-check","acceptanceCriteria":["openapi.yaml has new fields","TS types regenerated","type-check passes"]}
```
